name: NauticAWT Limited
summary: NauticAWT Limited provides offshore and marine engineering services. It operates through Renewables, Ports and Offshore, Energy & Mining, and Civil Structures segments. The Renewables segment provides ultra-high performance concrete and composite (UHPC) materials for the installation of onshore and offshore wind turbines. The Ports and Offshore segment offers engineering and contracting services for greenfield and brownfield offshore and marine infrastructure projects. The Energy & Mining segment provides UHPC materials for well integrity and remediation of production wells. The Civil Structures segment offers UHPC and high performance concrete and composite materials for the civil structures, facades, and claddings. The company operates in Australasia, India, rest of Asia, the Middle East, Africa, the Americas, and Europe. NauticAWT Limited was founded in 2011 and is based in Singapore.
